title: Origins Size-shifter
description: This mod adds a new origin. The Size-shifter. It has the ability to grow in size and shrink. In fact it can also climb to make the smaller sizes a bit nicer to play.
body:
# Adds the Size-shifter origin
This mod adds a new origin. The Size-shifter. It has the ability to grow in size and shrink. In fact it can also climb to make the smaller sizes a bit nicer to play.

## Bugs
Due to my lazynes there might be some bugs and/or lag related to the bigger sizes and the smaller sizes.

## Playing with other mods
I recomend playing with the "bits and chissels" mod on modrinth as it makes you able to mine individual pixels which is fun with the smaller sizes.
